moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: Racing lines
angles.copy: The wait is over, the British Grand Prix is here, who will take the chequered flag at Silverstone

angles.name: Pit stop
angles.copy: It's race day at Silverstone, get ready for a thrilling day of Formula 1 action

angles.name: Chequered flag
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is one of the most iconic races in the F1 calendar, don't miss it

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show, the biggest agricultural show in Europe, takes place at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells

angles.name: Agricultural pride
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a celebration of Welsh farming and rural life, get ready for a fantastic four days

angles.name: Rural delights
angles.copy: From livestock to local produce, the Royal Welsh Show has something for everyone

angles.name: Welsh countryside
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show is a showcase of the best of Welsh agriculture and rural culture

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games come to Glasgow, a home Games for Scotland

angles.name: Games fever
angles.copy: The wait is almost over, the Glasgow Commonwealth Games are just around the corner

angles.name: Scottish pride
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are a chance for Scotland to shine on the world stage

angles.name: Sporting spectacle
angles.copy: The Glasgow Commonwealth Games will feature some of the world's top athletes, don't miss it

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship takes place at Royal Birkdale

angles.name: Golf's biggest stage
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious golf tournaments in the world, who will lift the Claret Jug

angles.name: Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: The 154th Open Championship takes place at the iconic Royal Birkdale course

angles.name: Links golf
angles.copy: The Open Championship is a true test of links golf, who will come out on top
